title: Chuck Norris: From Movie Star to Meme Legend
summary: Chuck Norris was a famous actor known for action movies and TV shows like Walker, Texas Ranger. He passed away recently at age 86. Many young people today don't know his films but recognize him from funny internet memes called 'Chuck Norris facts.' These memes started in the early 2000s and joke that he is super strong and can do impossible things, like counting to infinity twice. His family shared a sad message online, and his granddaughter talked about how people saw him as an icon. Even though he stopped making big movies, the memes kept him popular. Some young folks say they only know the jokes and not his real movies, showing how memes can make someone famous in a new way.

questions.question: What was Chuck Norris famous for in movies and TV?
How old was Chuck Norris when he passed away?
Who talked about Chuck Norris as an icon online?
Why do some young people only know Chuck Norris from memes?
When did the Chuck Norris memes start becoming popular?

background_read: Chuck Norris was an American actor and martial artist born in 1940. He became famous in the 1970s and 1980s for action movies where he played tough characters. He also starred in a TV show called Walker, Texas Ranger. In the 2000s, people on the internet created jokes about him being super strong and doing impossible things, which spread as memes. These memes made him famous to younger generations who might not have seen his films. His death in 2024 reminded people of his legacy in both movies and online culture.
Article_Structure: WHO: Chuck Norris, an actor and meme icon, his family, and young people.
WHAT: Chuck Norris passed away, and many know him only from funny internet memes called 'Chuck Norris facts.'
WHERE: Online on the internet and in Hawaii where he died.
WHY: To show how memes can keep someone famous even if people don't know their original work.

perspectives.description: Chuck Norris's family sees him as a beloved icon and is sad about his passing, sharing private memories.
Many young folks know Chuck Norris only from memes and jokes, not from his movies, showing a gap in cultural knowledge.
